## What does this PR change?

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Docs fix (typo, broken link, clarification)
- [ ] Docs improvement (new content)
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I am **not** submitting a project here (projects go via the [Project Submission Issue form](../../issues/new?template=project-submission.yml))
- [ ] Links work and remaining placeholders (<https://challenge.evoost.ai>, <https://challenge.evoost.ai/#register>, ...) are preserved unless intentionally replaced
